markdown:
# Dodge

lf you take the Dodge action, you gain the following benefits: until the start of your next turn, any attack roll made against you has [[disadvantage]] if you can see the attacker, and you make Dexterity [[saving_throw]] with [[advantage]].

You lose these benefits if you have the [[incapacitated]] condition or if your [[speed]] is 0.
